headline: GDDY Q1 Earnings beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y on Strong Airo Execution
summary: GoDaddy's Q1 beat is fueled by Airo-led execution, with faster monetization, ARPU up 9.3% y/y to $246, and stronger margins and cash flow.
